title: clinopodium coccineum
intro: Clinopodium coccineum, also known as Red-Flowered Calamian, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Clinopodium coccineum have been known to provide relief from digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, among other benefits. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
